$Comment: HARDCORE preset (partial overlay, decoded via MobScalingSettingsAsset.CODEC). Only the keys that differ from Default; omitted leaves fall through to the jar Default via the per-leaf fold. Selected by setting ActivePreset:"Hardcore" (owner file or /mobscaling preset Hardcore). A harsher curve: hard intensity, dense specials, a wider group swing, an early near-max distance escalation, and a steeper StatCurve (faster HP/damage growth, higher caps).
Name: Hardcore
